research_basis: Reflexion episodic verbal memory from feedback
Voyager skill library and environment-feedback loop
LangSmith offline/online evaluation and trace-to-dataset feedback loop

scenario_results.notes: Full Mission Trajectory Ledger captures mission, plan, evidence, actions, policy, approvals, outcome, exceptions, cost/time, rollback, and lessons.
Experience Library allows browsing, search, and inspection per scoped workspace.
Past experience visibly influences a new mission through cited, inspectable recommendations without auto-execution.
All mission trajectories are stored as reference corpus rather than silently converted to truth.
Selective conversion into memory/rules requires explicit lesson proposal and promotion state.
Local experience remains local and cannot become global product truth automatically.
Promotion ladder is enforced and skips are rejected before workspace/playbook promotion.
Behavior signals support personalization but cannot outrank outcome evidence.
Model self-evaluation is recorded as local_test support and never replaces outcome evidence or deterministic PASS.
Lessons include applicability and non-applicability boundaries with evidence required before use.
Bad or over-broad lessons can be rolled back with affected-scope reporting.
Product self-improvement is proposal-first with benchmarks, approval, monitoring, rollback, and no global mutation.
Namespace-local self-improvement can run and reset without changing other namespaces or product defaults.
Outcome quality metrics are visible and prioritize outcome quality over autonomy ratio.
Failure is preserved as searchable learning material with reason and recovery attempt.
Experience search enforces privacy boundaries across personal and organization scopes.
Connected-system outcome learning is re-ingested as evidence and tied to governed action/audit.
Experience export supports audit/migration with redaction and trajectories, lessons, judge results, outcomes, and playbooks.
